hooks.command: REPO_ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname {filePath})" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || dirname {filePath}) && cd "$REPO_ROOT/backend" && ruff check --fix {filePath}
REPO_ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname {filePath})" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || dirname {filePath}) && cd "$REPO_ROOT/frontend" && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || true
